issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: bottom_u_bend direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 27.7417 mm but at least 35 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.45, 0.45, 0.35, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance; top_bridge_inverted_u direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 18.6983 mm but at least 25 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.4, 0.45, 0.4, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance

next_actions: Fix INTENT_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.
